record.field:
Creates a new CMS page for the authenticated company.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager
**Required Headers:** - `Authorization: Bearer {access_token}` - `X-Session-Id: {session_id}` - `X-Company-Id: {company_id}`
**Optional:** Pass `template_id` to pre-fill content from an existing template.
**Error Responses:** - **400 Bad Request**: Invalid JSON body - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT token - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient role (agent or lower) - **409 Conflict**: `slug` already exists for this company - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error (slug format, JSON schema)

{ "type": "object", "title": "CreatePageRequest", "required": ["name", "slug"], "properties": { "name": {"type": "string", "example": "Home Page"}, "slug": {"type": "string", "example": "home", "pattern": "^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$"}, "title": {"type": "string", "example": "Home — My Agency"}, "meta_description": {"type": "string", "example": "Best properties in town"}, "og_title": {"type": "string", "example": "Home"}, "og_description": {"type": "string", "example": "Find your dream property"}, "og_image_id": {"type": "integer", "example": 42}, "canonical_url": {"type": "string", "example": "https://example.com/home"}, "robots_meta": {"type": "string", "example": "index,follow"}, "structured_data": {"type": "string", "example": "{\"@context\": \"https://schema.org\"}"}, "content": {"type": "string", "description": "Puck JSON content (≤512KB)"}, "template_id": {"type": "integer", "description": "Copy content from this template"} } }
List all CMS pages for the authenticated company

Returns all CMS pages scoped to the authenticated company. Content body is NOT included in list — fetch individual page for content.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager, agent
**Query Parameters:** - `status` (string, optional): Filter by status (`draft`, `pending_review`, `published`, `archived`) - `limit` (int, optional): Max results. Default: 50 - `offset` (int, optional): Pagination offset. Default: 0
**Error Responses:** - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient permissions
Get a single CMS page including its content

Returns full page data including the Puck JSON content body.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager, agent
**Path Parameters:** - `id` (integer): Page ID
**Error Responses:** - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient permissions - **404 Not Found**: Page does not exist or belongs to another company
Update CMS page metadata, content, or status

Partial update of a CMS page. Any combination of fields may be sent. Include `status` to trigger a state machine transition.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager
**Path Parameters:** - `id` (integer): Page ID
**State Machine Transitions:** - `draft` → `pending_review`, `published` - `pending_review` → `published`, `draft` - `published` → `archived` - `archived` → `draft`
**Error Responses:** - **400 Bad Request**: Invalid JSON - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient role (agent or lower) - **404 Not Found**: Page not found for this company - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Invalid transition, content too large, invalid JSON schema

Sets `active=False` on the page (soft delete). The page remains in the database but is hidden from API list responses.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager
**Path Parameters:** - `id` (integer): Page ID
**Error Responses:** - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient role - **404 Not Found**: Page not found for this company
Duplicate a CMS page with a unique slug

Creates a copy of the page with a new unique slug (`{original-slug}-copy`, `-copy-2`, etc.). The duplicate always starts in `draft` status.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager
**Path Parameters:** - `id` (integer): Source page ID
**Error Responses:** - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient role - **404 Not Found**: Source page not found for this company
Upload a media file (image, video, or document)

Uploads a binary file using `multipart/form-data`. MIME type is validated by magic bytes (not extension). File is stored in `ir.attachment` and a `cms.media` record is created.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager
**Content-Type:** `multipart/form-data` **Form Field:** `file` — the binary file
**Supported MIME Types:** - **Images:** `image/jpeg`, `image/png`, `image/gif`, `image/webp` (max 10MB) - **Videos:** `video/mp4`, `video/webm` (max 100MB) - **Documents:** `application/pdf`, `text/plain` (max 20MB)
**Error Responses:** - **400 Bad Request**: No file in request - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient role - **413 Payload Too Large**: File exceeds size limit - **415 Unsupported Media Type**: MIME type not in whitelist or magic-bytes mismatch - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: MIME mismatch between claimed and detected
List all media files for the authenticated company

Returns metadata for all media files scoped to the authenticated company.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager, agent
**Query Parameters:** - `media_type` (string, optional): Filter by type (`image`, `video`, `document`) - `limit` (int, optional): Default 50 - `offset` (int, optional): Default 0
**Error Responses:** - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient permissions
Get metadata for a single media file

Returns JSON metadata for a media file. Does NOT return binary content — use `/file` endpoint for the actual file.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager, agent
**Path Parameters:** - `id` (integer): Media ID
**Error Responses:** - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **404 Not Found**: Media not found for this company

Returns the raw binary file with the correct `Content-Type` header from the stored MIME type.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager, agent
**Path Parameters:** - `id` (integer): Media ID
**Error Responses:** - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **404 Not Found**: Media not found for this company or attachment missing
Hard-delete a media file and its ir.attachment

Permanently deletes the `cms.media` record AND the associated `ir.attachment` from the filestore. This is a hard delete (ADR-015 exception — media has no audit trail requirement).
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager
**Path Parameters:** - `id` (integer): Media ID
**Error Responses:** - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient role - **404 Not Found**: Media not found for this company
Fetch a published CMS page by company slug and page slug

Public endpoint returning a published, active CMS page. No session or company authentication required — company is resolved from `company_slug` in the URL.
**Authentication:** JWT only (no session, no company header)
**Path Parameters:** - `company_slug` (string): Unique slug configured in CMS Settings - `page_slug` (string): Page slug
**Returns:** Page data including content, SEO fields, and default OG values from company settings.
**Excluded Fields:** `status`, `active`, `company_id`, `custom_js`, `custom_css`, `create_date`, `write_date`
**Error Responses:** - **404 Not Found**: Company slug not found, page not found, or page is not published/active

Creates a reusable page template. Templates are used to pre-fill page content during page creation.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager (agents cannot access templates)
**Error Responses:** - **400 Bad Request**: Invalid JSON - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient role - **409 Conflict**: Template name already exists for this company - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error
List all CMS templates for the company

Returns all active templates for the authenticated company. Content is NOT included — fetch individual template for content.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager (agents get 403)
**Error Responses:** - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Agent role or lower
Get a single CMS template including its content

Returns full template data including Puck JSON content.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager
**Path Parameters:** - `id` (integer): Template ID
**Error Responses:** - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient role - **404 Not Found**: Template not found for this company
Update CMS template name, category, or content

Partial update of a template. Only fields present in the body are updated.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager
**Path Parameters:** - `id` (integer): Template ID
**Error Responses:** - **400 Bad Request**: Invalid JSON - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient role - **404 Not Found**: Template not found for this company - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error

Soft-deletes the template by setting `active=False`. The template remains in the database.
**Required Roles:** owner, director, manager
**Path Parameters:** - `id` (integer): Template ID
**Error Responses:** - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Insufficient role - **404 Not Found**: Template not found for this company
Get or auto-create CMS settings for the company

Returns the singleton CMS settings for the company. Auto-creates the singleton if it does not yet exist. The `custom_js` field is **only included for owner role**.
**Required Roles:** owner (full), director, manager (custom_js excluded)
**Error Responses:** - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Agent or lower role
Update CMS settings for the company

Partial update of CMS settings. CSS injection in `custom_css` is blocked at service layer. `custom_js` is restricted to owner role.
**Required Roles:** owner (full access), director, manager (custom_js restricted)
**CSS Injection Detection:** The following patterns are blocked in `custom_css`: - `expression(...)` — IE CSS expression - `behavior:` — IE behavior property - `url(javascript:...)` — JavaScript URI in CSS - `@import` — CSS import directive - `-moz-binding` — Mozilla binding
**Error Responses:** - **400 Bad Request**: Invalid JSON - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid JWT - **403 Forbidden**: Non-owner attempting to set `custom_js` - **409 Conflict**: `company_slug` already in use by another company - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: CSS injection detected, company_slug format invalid
